title: News Across the World
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on news across the world within the The World Prepares for the Reverie storyline.
scene: The story widens beyond Zou as the world prepares for the Reverie and the Sanji retrieval team moves toward Big Mom’s territory.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: the sand country, the kingdom of Alabasta

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Take care!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Where are VIVI and her party headed?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Your majesty!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: prin- CSS VIVI!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: VIVI sure looked pretty exasperated back there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I guess her pirates tendencies have awoken again...

dialogue.speaker: World Royals
dialogue.text: And just when I thought she'd become a proper princess...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes... Hina here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We've just departed Alabama.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I will ensure the Nefeltari family...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Makes it safely to Mariejois!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Our estimated time of arrival is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: PRINCE~ ~SS!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: PRINCE~ ~SS!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Get down from there at once!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The salty breeze feels so wonderful...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: prin~ce~ "SSS!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What will you do if a monstrous bird flies by and kid- naps you?!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Or if you're in a sniper's sights?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Or if a meteor strikes?!

dialogue.speaker: World Royals
dialogue.text: You worry far too much. The Princess has plenty of experience being a pin-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: SSHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Have you lost your mind, Pell?! There's a marine officer right there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Cough Cough

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Do not over exert your- self, your majesty.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If you're not feeling up to it, say the word. We can head back at any time.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No... I'm fine!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ever since the day I met nice Robin...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: My dream...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There's been something I've wanted to ask the world government...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: affords me far too many enemies.

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: About the poneglyphs, I assume?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Come hell or high water, I will see to it that I attend this veverie!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If I get the chance, I would like to learn...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: All those years ago...

dialogue.speaker: World Royals
dialogue.text: What in the world did the king of the Nefeltari clan do to the world?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: AAAAA AH! AASH! Careful! AAAAHHH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Cough Cough

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Come now, don't be such a worry want.

dialogue.speaker: World Royals
dialogue.text: AAAGGHHH! You'll be the death of me, Princess!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Father! How are you feel- ing?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hmm... I've felt better.

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: I don't know how much longer I have left... if only my daughter would quickly choose me a son-in-law...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Cough Cough

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Kueeh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: There you go using your illness as an excuse again! That's not fair!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We've got piles and piles of suitors' photos in the Palace!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Fufufu... you may as well throw 'em all out.

summary: News Across the World: The story widens beyond Zou as the world prepares for the Reverie and the Sanji retrieval team moves toward Big Mom’s territory.
